Created AGROVERSE_SHOP_PAGE_CONVENTIONS.md, updated TRUESIGHT_ME_PAGE_CONVENTIONS.md and PROJECT_INDEX.md for future LLM/Sophia discoverability. All paths root-relative, no depth-dependent prefixes, single source of truth per JS file.
